<?php namespace Illuminate\Support\Traits; trait Dumpable { /** * Dump the given arguments and terminate execution. * * @param mixed ...$args * @return never */ public function dd(...$args) { dd($this, ...$args); } /** * Dump the given arguments. * * @param mixed ...$args * @return $this */ public function dump(...$args) { dump($this, ...$args); return $this; } }
